pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh and direct inspection of ReqView ExampleProject SRS.json
Code analysis of setup_task.sh which modifies documents/ASVS.json
Code analysis of setup_task.sh where exactly 4 items are injected
Python script parsing the baseline ASVS.json file using the exact counting logic from setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task injects exactly 4 contaminating items into the target document 'ASVS' from the 'SRS' document. The injected items are given new ASVS IDs 900, 901, 902, and 903, which map to original SRS IDs 53, 77, 109, and 163 respectively. The injected items pertain to creating documents, exporting to CSV, moving requirements, and printing tables. Prior to this injection, the ASVS document contains exactly 405 legitimate security requirement items.
